description: Product Description DIAMANTE AT DIAMANTE we have over 30 years worth of experience working with centuries old British and international crystal and homeware brands. As a family based, artisanal crystal engraver and producer our British designs are all realised in Europe from only the best, premium materials An introduction to DIAMANTE The video showcases the product in use. Diamante showcase video Merchant video All your crystal needs covered Glasses & Tumblers We offer a wide variety of decorated and undecorated wine glasses, champagne flutes and saucers, short tumblers as well as hi balls. Vases & Bowls Our vases and bowls come in all shapes and sizes. They're great for flowers and bouquets or they make wonderful standalone decorations themselves Gifts All of our items are safely gift packaged ready to go. Whether it's a birthday, anniversary or just because, we offer a variety of decorated gifts Whisky Sets Bourbon, Scotch or Irish whisky? No matter which you prefer our whisky sets and tumblers are a great way to savour every sip Who is DIAMANTE? We are family based designers and producers of crystal from Bedfordshire. We specialise in uniquely decorated pieces and we also supply some prestigious crystal brands so it's likely you may have one of our glasses without even knowing! Why choose DIAMANTE crystal? We've been in the industry across multiple generations for over 35 years. Our pieces are made in the EU and the UK so not only is our glass made to the highest standards, but you can also be sure that our glasses are regulated and safe to drink from. What's the difference between crystal and glass? In general crystal has extra elements (lead in the older days) that make it considerably clearer and more refractive. Our techniques also allow for greater manipulation so we can make the glasses as thin or bulky as is required for a premium feel How are the items packaged? We have done countless drop tests to ensure the vases and glasses arrive safely. However accidents do happen and we are quick to replace anything that may arrive damaged on arrival. We also gift package 95% of our items so they are perfect gifts!
